label: M_A_Mast_cell
evidence: In the main and supplementary materials of the atlas paper (10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x), annotation label patterns such as 'M_A_X' are used, where 'M_A' denotes 'adult myeloid'. Mast cell is a well-defined immune cell type found in skin. The full name 'Mast cell' is explicitly listed in the cell type metadata and summary tables for adult skin immune annotations (see Supplementary Table 2 and Supplementary Data tables). No alternative or ambiguous naming for 'M_A_Mast_cell' was found.
